headline: Camden Property Trust Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Camden Property Trust (NYSE:CPT) reported first-quarter 2026 results that came in ahead of the midpoint of management’s guidance, while executives emphasized that much of the outperformance was timing-related and that the company is watching peak leasing season closely. headline: Camden expects lower apartment supply to buoy second half
summary: In a first-quarter 2026 earnings call, the REIT’s leaders said they are in the right high-demand markets to capitalize on tighter supply.

headline: CPT Q1 FFO Beats Estimates Despite Lower Property Revenues
summary: Camden Property Trust tops Q1 core FFO estimates despite lower revenues, as buybacks, development and asset deals steer its 2026 outlook.

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on Camden Prop Trust, Lowers Price Target to $107
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Steve Sakwa   maintains Camden Prop Trust (NYSE:CPT) with a In-Line and lowers the price target from $108 to $107.
